race.comment: YEAH BUDDY (8) wound up strongly at the end of 1200m at Gold Coast beaten just 0.6 lengths. He's back to his best and on a 7-day back-up rates to be winning. CHOCECLAIR (9) has been in the placings here at her last two starts. Races handy and a senior hoop rides today. She can be fighting it out for the quinella placing. HELL TO THE LINE (3) was close to breaking through last time in work. Has placed fresh and will be naturally improved. Has a handy 2kg claim and keep safe. BRAVE HORATIUS (1) produced a fair effort at the Sunshine Coast on debut. Needs a good ride but he will be fitter and this is easier.
